text: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَتُبْ عَلَيَّ إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ التَّوَّابُ الْغَفُورُ
transliteration: Rabbi ighfir li wa tub alayya innaka antat-Tawwabul-Ghafur
meaning: My Lord, forgive me and accept my repentance. Truly You are the Ever-Returning, the All-Forgiving.
meaningAr: كان النبي ﷺ يقولها مئة مرة في المجلس الواحد

text: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللهَ الَّذِي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيَّ الْقَيُّومَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ
transliteration: Astaghfirullaha alladhi la ilaha illa huwal-Hayyul-Qayyum wa atubu ilayh
meaning: I seek forgiveness of Allah, the Living, the Self-Sustaining, and I repent to Him.
meaningAr: غُفر له وإن كان فارًّا من الزحف
subEn: Whoever says it will be forgiven

text: سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ وَبِحَمْدِكَ أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ أَسْتَغْفِرُكَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْكَ
transliteration: Subhanakal-lahumma wa bihamdika ashhadu an la ilaha illa anta astaghfiruka wa atubu ilayk
meaning: Glory be to You, O Allah, and praise. I testify that there is no god but You. I seek Your forgiveness and repent to You.
meaningAr: كفارة المجلس — من قالها كُفِّر ما كان في المجلس

text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْهُدَى وَالتُّقَى وَالْعَفَافَ وَالْغِنَى
transliteration: Allahumma inni as'alukal-huda wat-tuqa wal-afafa wal-ghina
meaning: O Allah, I ask You for guidance, piety, chastity, and self-sufficiency.
meaningAr: من أجمع الأدعية النبوية في طلب الخير
subEn: One of the most comprehensive duas

meaning: O Allah, guide me and make me steadfast.

text: اللَّهُمَّ أَلْهِمْنِي رُشْدِي وَأَعِذْنِي مِنْ شَرِّ نَفْسِي
transliteration: Allahumma alhimni rushdi wa a'idhni min sharri nafsi
meaning: O Allah, inspire me with my right guidance and protect me from the evil of my own soul.
meaningAr: طلب الرشد والحماية من شر النفس

text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْجُبْنِ وَالْبُخْلِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ غَلَبَةِ الدَّيْنِ وَقَهْرِ الرِّجَالِ
transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-hammi wal-hazan, wa a'udhu bika minal-ajzi wal-kasal, wa a'udhu bika minal-jubni wal-bukhl, wa a'udhu bika min ghalabatid-dayni wa qahrir-rijal
meaning: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from anxiety and sorrow, weakness and laziness, cowardice and miserliness, and from being overcome by debt and overpowered by men.
meaningAr: كان النبي ﷺ يكثر من هذا الدعاء
subEn: Supplication to remove worry and grief

text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ زَوَالِ نِعْمَتِكَ وَتَحَوُّلِ عَافِيَتِكَ وَفُجَاءَةِ نِقْمَتِكَ وَجَمِيعِ سَخَطِكَ
transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min zawali ni'matik wa tahawwuli afiyatik wa fuja'ati niqmatik wa jami'i sakhatak
meaning: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the removal of Your blessings, the change of Your wellness, the sudden onset of Your punishment, and all of Your wrath.

text: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
transliteration: Rabbana atina fid-dunya hasanatan wa fil-akhirati hasanatan wa qina adhaban-nar
meaning: Our Lord, give us good in this world and good in the Hereafter, and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.
meaningAr: أكثر دعاء كان يدعو به النبي ﷺ
subEn: The most frequent dua of the Prophet ﷺ

text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَفْوَ وَالْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ
transliteration: Allahumma inni as'alukal-afwa wal-afiyata fid-dunya wal-akhirah
meaning: O Allah, I ask You for pardon and well-being in this world and the Hereafter.
meaningAr: ما سُئل الله شيئًا أحبَّ إليه من العافية
subEn: One of the most comprehensive supplications

text: يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّومُ بِرَحْمَتِكَ أَسْتَغِيثُ أَصْلِحْ لِي شَأْنِي كُلَّهُ وَلَا تَكِلْنِي إِلَى نَفْسِي طَرْفَةَ عَيْنٍ
transliteration: Ya Hayyu ya Qayyum bi rahmatika astaghith aslih li sha'ni kullahu wa la takilni ila nafsi tarfata ayn
meaning: O Living, O Self-Sustaining, by Your mercy I seek relief. Set right all my affairs and do not leave me to myself even for the blink of an eye.
meaningAr: من أسماء الله الحسنى — استغاثة عظيمة

text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ رِزْقًا طَيِّبًا وَعِلْمًا نَافِعًا وَعَمَلًا مُتَقَبَّلًا
transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka rizqan tayyiban wa ilman nafi'an wa amalan mutaqabbala
meaning: O Allah, I ask You for pure provision, beneficial knowledge, and accepted deeds.

text: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلَالِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ وَأَغْنِنِي بِفَضْلِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ
transliteration: Allahummak-fini bi halalika an haramik wa aghnini bi fadlika amman siwak
meaning: O Allah, suffice me with what is lawful against what is unlawful, and make me independent by Your bounty of all besides You.

text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْمًا نَافِعًا وَرِزْقًا طَيِّبًا وَعَمَلًا مُتَقَبَّلًا
transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka ilman nafi'an wa rizqan tayyiban wa amalan mutaqabbala
meaning: O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge, pure provision, and accepted deeds.
